testcase.name: testSafe_RaceCondition_OverlapSeats

failure.message: bookingRepository.save( <any com.example.QLDatVe.entities.Booking> ); Wanted 1 time: -> at com.example.QLDatVe.services.BookingSafetyTest.runCustomRace(BookingSafetyTest.java:251) But was 2 times: -> at com.example.QLDatVe.services.BookingService.createBooking(BookingService.java:97) -> at com.example.QLDatVe.services.BookingService.createBooking(BookingService.java:97)

testcase.failure:
org.mockito.exceptions.verification.TooManyActualInvocations:
bookingRepository.save( <any com.example.QLDatVe.entities.Booking> ); Wanted 1 time: -> at com.example.QLDatVe.services.BookingSafetyTest.runCustomRace(BookingSafetyTest.java:251) But was 2 times: -> at com.example.QLDatVe.services.BookingService.createBooking(BookingService.java:97) -> at com.example.QLDatVe.services.BookingService.createBooking(BookingService.java:97)
at com.example.QLDatVe.services.BookingSafetyTest.runCustomRace(BookingSafetyTest.java:251) at com.example.QLDatVe.services.BookingSafetyTest.testSafe_RaceCondition_OverlapSeats(BookingSafetyTest.java:153) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.mockito.internal.runners.DefaultInternalRunner$1$1.evaluate(DefaultInternalRunner.java:55) at org.mockito.internal.runners.DefaultInternalRunner$1.run(DefaultInternalRunner.java:100) at org.mockito.internal.runners.DefaultInternalRunner.run(DefaultInternalRunner.java:107) at org.mockito.internal.runners.StrictRunner.run(StrictRunner.java:42) at org.mockito.junit.MockitoJUnitRunner.run(MockitoJUnitRunner.java:163)
testcase.system-out: --- Testing: Overlap Booking ([D01, D02] vs [D02, D03]) --- 00:43:38.972 [pool-2-thread-2] INFO com.example.QLDatVe.services.BookingService -- Booking ID null đã được tạo với trạng thái CONFIRMED. 00:43:38.972 [pool-2-thread-1] INFO com.example.QLDatVe.services.BookingService -- Booking ID null đã được tạo với trạng thái CONFIRMED. 00:43:38.997 [pool-2-thread-2] INFO com.example.QLDatVe.services.BookingService -- ✅ Email xác nhận đã gửi thành công cho ID: null 00:43:38.997 [pool-2-thread-1] INFO com.example.QLDatVe.services.BookingService -- ✅ Email xác nhận đã gửi thành công cho ID: null
testcase.system-err: !!! BUG DETECTED: Overlap Booking Failed - Cả 2 người đều mua được ghế trùng nhau !!!

testcase.name: testFunc_OneUser_MultipleSeats
